channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PGFOILQ] PG Foils Board Meeting on May 28, 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
PG Foils Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 28, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company has also announced the closure of the trading window from April 1, 2026, which will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results. This information is available on the company's website.

  • PG Foils board to meet on May 28, 2026 for audited financial results.
  • Meeting will cover results for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, reopening 48 hours post results.
  • Information is available on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PG FOILS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHREECEM] Shree Cement Receives ₹153.47 Cr Income Tax Demand
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Shree Cement Ltd. has received a Final Assessment Order under Section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961, for FY 2022-23, resulting in a demand of ₹153.47 Cr (including interest). The company plans to adjust this demand against pending refunds and is taking legal action, expecting the demand to subside based on previous years' orders. Shree Cement does not anticipate any significant impact on its financial operations.

  • Shree Cement received Final Assessment Order u/s 143(3) for FY 2022-23.
  • The order includes a demand of ₹153.47 Cr, inclusive of interest.
  • The demand will be adjusted against pending refunds receivable by the company.
  • Shree Cement is pursuing legal remedies and expects the demand to subside.
  • Company anticipates no significant impact on financials or operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHREE CEMENT LTD. | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [ATL] Allcargo Terminals: April 2026 Volumes Up 7% YoY to 59.2K TEUs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Allcargo Terminals Ltd reported its monthly operational update for April 2026. The company's total volumes reached 59.2 '000 TEUs, reflecting a 7% increase compared to April 2025 and a 1% increase compared to March 2026. This information is based on a limited review by the management and is available on the company's website.

  • Allcargo Terminals' April 2026 volumes totaled 59.2K TEUs.
  • Volumes increased 7% YoY compared to April 2025.
  • Volumes increased 1% compared to March 2026.
  • ICD is a Joint Venture with CONCOR.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Allcargo Terminals Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [CROMPTON] Crompton Greaves Denies Stake Acquisition Discussions
item.description:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd has clarified that it is not engaged in any discussions regarding the acquisition of a majority stake in the company, as reported in media outlets. The company issued this statement in response to news items suggesting potential bidders were in the race to acquire a significant stake.

  • Crompton Greaves denies media reports of stake acquisition talks.
  • The company states it is not in discussions for a majority stake sale.
  • The clarification addresses speculation about potential bidders.
  • This announcement aims to dispel rumors and provide accurate information.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [VEDL] Vedanta: Cost of Acquisition Apportionment Post Demerger
item.description:
Vedanta Ltd. announced the apportionment of cost of acquisition for equity shares following the demerger of its Aluminum, Merchant Power, Oil and Gas, and Iron Ore Undertakings into four Resulting Companies. Shareholders can apportion their total cost of acquisition with Vedanta Limited at 52.34%, Vedanta Aluminium Metal Limited at 7.15%, Talwandi Sabo Power Limited at 12.23%, Malco Energy Limited at 21.49%, and Vedanta Iron and Steel Limited at 6.79%. This apportionment is based on the net worth and net assets as per the Income-tax Act, 2025. The demerger came into effect on May 1, 2026, with Resulting Companies issuing one equity share for each share held in Vedanta.

  • Vedanta demerged four undertakings into separate Resulting Companies.
  • Shareholders receive one equity share in each Resulting Company for every Vedanta share held.
  • Cost of acquisition apportionment: Vedanta Ltd (52.34%), Vedanta Aluminium (7.15%), Talwandi Sabo (12.23%), Malco Energy (21.49%), Vedanta Iron and Steel (6.79%).
  • Apportionment is based on net worth and net assets as per Income-tax Act, 2025.
  • Effective date of the scheme is May 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vedanta Limited | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [ALUFLUOR] Alufluoride Board to Consider Final Dividend on May 22, 2026
item.description:
Alufluoride Ltd has announced that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled for May 22, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend for the financial year 2025-2026, subject to approval.

  • Alufluoride board meeting set for May 22, 2026.
  • Audited FY26 financial results to be considered.
  • Final dividend for FY26 to be recommended, if any.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ALUFLUORIDE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZEAL] Zeal Aqua Board Meeting on May 28, 2026 to Approve Financial Results
item.description:
Zeal Aqua Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 28, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will be held at the company's registered office. The trading window for directors, KMPs, officers, designated employees, and their immediate relatives has been closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results, as per the company's code of conduct on insider trading.

  • Zeal Aqua board to meet on May 28, 2026 for financial results.
  • Meeting to approve audited standalone financial results for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours post results.
  • Meeting scheduled at registered office in Surat, Gujarat.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zeal Aqua Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RUSHIL] Rushil Decor Board Meeting on May 29, 2026
item.description:
Rushil Decor Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 29, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider a proposal for the recommendation of a dividend on the company's equity shares for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window, which was closed on April 1, 2026, will reopen on May 31, 2026, following the submission of the financial results.

  • Rushil Decor board to approve FY26 audited financial results.
  • Dividend recommendation to be considered at the board meeting.
  • Trading window to reopen on May 31, 2026.
  • Meeting scheduled for May 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RUSHIL DECOR LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [LICI] LIC to Participate in Investors Meet on May 22, 2026
item.description:
Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC) will participate in an Investors Meet on May 22, 2026. The participation is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. LIC will engage in group and one-on-one meetings at the Centrum Broking Ltd – Flagship Virtual Conference, Nakshatra III - Shining Stars amid Global Turbulence. A presentation will be made to investors/analysts virtually. The information is available on LIC's website.

  • LIC to participate in Investors Meet on May 22, 2026.
  • The meet is the Centrum Broking Ltd – Flagship Virtual Conference.
  • LIC will conduct group and one-on-one meetings.
  • A presentation will be made to investors/analysts virtually.
  • The announcement complies with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Life Insurance Corporation of India | Category: Business Update

item.title: [KHAZANCHI] Khazanchi Jewellers Board Meeting on May 22, 2026
item.description:
Khazanchi Jewellers Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 22, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter, half year, and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for designated persons remains closed from April 1, 2026, to May 24, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 22, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Financial results are for the quarter, half year, and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed for designated persons from April 1 to May 24, 2026.
  • Insider trading regulations are in effect during the trading window closure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Khazanchi Jewellers Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
